critical_issues.evidence: Story 1.14 lists dependencies on Story 1.12 and Story 1.13, and both story files remain Draft as of 2026-05-04.

critical_issues.summary: Executor assignment is too broad for the dynamic assignment matrix.
critical_issues.evidence: The story includes DB/RLS/migrations, frontend admin/settings UI, E2E, and security review under executor @dev / quality_gate @architect; the template maps DB/RLS work to @data-engineer with @dev gate.

critical_issues.summary: Scope is too large without explicit split ownership and sequencing.
critical_issues.evidence: TASK-P18 through TASK-P22 combine migrations, admin CRUD, health polling, settings, Playwright setup, and security review in one story.

should_fix_issues.summary: Add build to quality_gate_tools or document why it is excluded.
Clarify the `empresas` schema or source because TASK-P18 requires it but SPEC SQL only defines profiles, user_roles, and notifications.
Define the security checklist artifact path or ownership for the signed TASK-P22 review.
Explicitly keep Super Admin API key management out of scope or source it, because SPEC mentions it but TASK-P21 does not.
